name: Mom's Coleslaw
recipeIngredient: 1/8 cup Finely chopped parsley and chives
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove outer leaves from cabbage, then core.
2. Cut heads into quarters and soak in cold water in the refrigerator for 1 to 2 hours.
3. Shake off excess water and shred very finely. Pat shreds dry with towels.
4. Place the shreds in a bowl and mix in all other ingredients.
5. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour before serving.
Makes 8 servings. Per serving: 220 calories, 1 g protein, 7 g carbohydrate, 22 g fat (3 g saturated), 16 mg cholesterol, 227 mg sodium, 2 g fiber.
